name: prefix-space-separator
description: Paragraph with w:left=360, tab at 720, text '(a) Body text...' (space separator, not tab). Tests that space-separated prefix doesn't incorrectly use tab stop logic.
expected_behavior: left=360 (from resolved indent, unchanged by prefix stripping). Space-separated prefix does not consume a tab stop.
current_status: TESTING — space prefix may or may not trigger the bug
